news.headline: Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) increases quarterly dividend by 5% to $0.22 per share for Q1 2025.
news.summary: In New York on January 9, 2025, Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) revealed a dividend declaration for the first quarter of 2025 at $0.22 per Class A ordinary share. This represents a 5% upsurge compared to the dividend paid in the prior quarter.

news.headline: Wabash (NYSE: WNC) named one of America’s Most Responsible Companies by Newsweek for the third year in 2025.
news.summary: In Lafayette, Indiana, on January 9, 2025, it was announced that Wabash (NYSE: WNC), a renowned provider of supply chain solutions for transportation, logistics, and infrastructure sectors, has been recognized as one of America's Most Responsible Companies by Newsweek for the third consecutive year. Notably, Wabash stands out as the sole trailer and truck body manufacturer to make it to the prestigious 2025 list.

news.headline: French company disclosing voting rights and share capital as per regulations.
news.summary: As per regulations outlined in the French Commercial Code and the General Regulation of the French Financial Markets Authority (Autorité des Marchés Financiers) under articles L.233-8 II and 223-16 respectively.

news.headline: Crunch Fitness in Los Angeles opens doors for wildfire-affected community to charge phones, use wifi, and take showers.
news.summary: Crunch Fitness in Los Angeles has opened its doors to the community amid ongoing wildfires, offering a space for individuals to charge their phones, utilize wifi, and access shower facilities. This generous initiative aims to support those affected by the wildfires while providing essential services. As of January 9, 2025, the gym is welcoming individuals in need of such amenities as they navigate the challenges posed by the natural disaster.

news.headline: Aritzia Inc. (TSX: ATZ) announced its Q3 fiscal 2025 results on Jan. 9, 2025, showcasing its financial performance.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 9, 2025, Aritzia Inc. (TSX: ATZ) revealed its financial performance for the quarter concluding in December. Aritzia, recognized for its Everyday Luxury products both online and in physical stores, shared key insights regarding its operations. The precise figures were not disclosed, but the company demonstrated its commitment to transparency by informing stakeholders about its quarterly outcomes.

news.headline: Dave Inc. to join Needham Growth Conference on Jan 15 in NY; leading neobank on Nasdaq (DAVE) to discuss.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Dave Inc., known as "Dave" (Nasdaq: DAVE), a prominent neobank in the U.S., shared their involvement in the upcoming Needham Growth Conference happening on January 15, 2025, at the Lotte New York Palace Hotel in New York, NY.

news.headline: Gatos Silver announced 2024 production results at their CLG mine in Mexico, with silver production meeting top guidance end.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Gatos Silver, Inc. shared production figures for the quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2024, from the Cerro Los Gatos ("CLG") mine in Mexico, a venture the company holds a 70% stake in. Their silver production for 2024 was within the high end of the projected range, and silver equivalent production slightly surpassed the upper limit of the anticipated range. The guidance for both these metrics was adjusted upwards in October 2024.

news.headline: Atlassian (NASDAQ: TEAM) to report Q2 fiscal year 2025 results on Jan 30, 2025 after market close and host conference call at 2:00 P.M. PT.
news.summary: Atlassian Corporation, a prominent provider of team collaboration and productivity software, is set to report its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025 that ended on December 31, 2024. The announcement will occur after the market closes on Thursday, January 30, 2025. The company will conduct a conference call at 2:00 P.M. Pacific Time to review the financial outcomes. Additionally, Atlassian will make the earnings press release and relevant information available to shareholders simultaneously. Atlassian is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol TEAM.

news.headline: JFrog to report Q4 and fiscal 2024 results on Feb 13, 2025, with conference call at 2:00 p.m. PT.
news.summary: JFrog Ltd., a leading Liquid Software company (Nasdaq: FROG) based in Sunnyvale, California, will be releasing its financial results for Q4 and fiscal year 2024 on Thursday, February 13, 2025, after the market closes. The company is set to hold a conference call at 2:00 p.m. PT on the same day to provide insights on the results. This event, JFrog’s Fourth Quarter and Fiscal 2024 Financial Results Conference Call, is an important one for investors and stakeholders. Make sure to tune in for key updates and analyses on JFrog's performance.

news.headline: Block, Inc. (NYSE: SQ) changes ticker symbols to "XYZ" alongside a name change to "Block", effective January 21, 2025.
news.summary: Oakland-based company Block, Inc. (NYSE: SQ) revealed plans to switch its ticker symbols, transitioning from “SQ” and “SQ2” to “XYZ” following the rebranding to “Block” and expansion to include Cash App, Square, Afterpay, and TIDAL. The adjustment will apply to its listings on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) and the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX). The changes will take effect on January 21, 2025.

news.headline: PagerDuty (NYSE:PD) to present at 27th Needham Growth Conference on Jan 15th at 8am ET. Live webcast available.
news.summary: In San Francisco, PagerDuty, Inc. (NYSE:PD), a prominent player in digital operations management, disclosed that its management staff will participate in the 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference on January 15th at 8 am ET. Those interested can access a live webcast and replay for a limited duration on PagerDuty’s investor relations events page at investor.pagerduty.com. PagerDuty, Inc. (NYSE:PD) is recognized globally for its expertise in digital operations management.

news.headline: FrontView REIT (NYSE: FVR) provided a year-end business update, with earnings release scheduled for March 19, 2025. Earnings call on March 20 at 10 a.m.
news.summary: FrontView REIT, Inc. (NYSE: FVR) shared a business update regarding the quarter ending December 31, 2024. They will disclose financial and operating outcomes for that quarter and the entire year of 2024 on Wednesday, March 19, 2025, after markets close. A conference call and audio webcast will be held on Thursday, March 20, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Central Time for further insights.

news.headline: Stellus Private Credit BDC declares $0.36 first-quarter 2025 regular dividend, $0.12 monthly (Jan, Feb, Mar).
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Stellus Private Credit BDC disclosed its dividend declaration, with each share set to receive $0.12 per month in January, February, and March, making a total quarterly dividend of $0.36.

news.headline: TriNetX's CEO Gadi Lachman to resign after 11 years, will remain on board. Largest global data source. Jan 9, 2025.
news.summary: Gadi Lachman, the Founder, President, and CEO of TriNetX, will be ending his 11-year operating role but will continue serving on the company's board. The announcement was made in Cambridge, Massachusetts on January 9, 2025. TriNetX is known as the largest global provider of real-world data.

news.headline: Highwoods Properties will announce Q4 2024 results on February 11.
Stellus Capital Investment Corp to pay $0.40 dividend in 2025, $0.1333 in Feb, Mar, Apr.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Stellus Capital Investment Corporation declared a monthly dividend of $0.1333 per share for January, February, and March, amounting to a total of $0.40 per share for the first quarter. The company's Board of Directors made this announcement.

news.headline: ImmuCell reported preliminary, unaudited sales results for Q4 and full year ended Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: In Portland, Maine, on Jan. 09, 2025, ImmuCell Corporation (Nasdaq: ICCC), a prominent animal health company focusing on products for dairy and beef cattle, shared its preliminary, unaudited sales overview for the quarter and full year ending on Dec. 31, 2024. ImmuCell is known for its development, manufacturing, and marketing of effective products that enhance the well-being and output of cattle.

news.headline: MongoDB, Inc. (NASDAQ: MDB) to present at 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference with COO/CFO and SVP of Finance.
news.summary: Today, in New York on January 9, 2025, MongoDB, Inc. (NASDAQ: MDB) shared news about their upcoming virtual presentation at the 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference. The event will feature presentations by Chief Operating Officer and Chief Financial Officer, Michael Gordon, as well as Senior Vice President of Finance, Serge Tanjga. This development marks an important milestone for the company and highlights their participation in the conference.

news.headline: Brookline Bancorp, Inc. will report Q4 2024 earnings on Jan. 29, 2025, and host a conference call on Jan. 30 at 1:30 PM ET.
news.summary: Brookline Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: BRKL) revealed plans to release their fourth quarter 2024 earnings on Wednesday, January 29, 2025, after market close. A conference call, led by management, is scheduled for Thursday, January 30, 2025, at 1:30 PM Eastern Time to discuss these financial results. Interested individuals can access the call and the Company’s Earnings Presentation by visiting https://events.q4inc.com/attendee/129324302. To listen to the call without slides, participants can call 833-470-1428 (U.S.) or 404-975-4839 (international) and request the Brookline Bancorp conference call by providing Access Code 138268. A recording of the call will be accessible for one week after the event by dialing 866-813-9403 (U.S.) or 1-929-458-6194 (international) with Passcode 646121. Both live and recorded versions of the call can also be found on the Company’s website at www.brooklinebancorp.com.

news.headline: ResMed to report 2nd quarter fiscal 2025 earnings on Jan 30, 2025. Stay tuned for key financial info post NYSE closing.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, ResMed disclosed its intention to unveil the financial and operational outcomes for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025 on January 30, 2025. This announcement comes with the closure of the New York Stock Exchange. The company, known as ResMed, will conduct a webcast led by its management post the release to analyze the results. The webcast may also cover additional future-oriented and significant details. ResMed is identified on the NYSE as RMD and on the ASX as RMD.

news.headline: LPL Financial to report Q4 and full year 2024 earnings on Jan 30, with a conference call scheduled for 5 p.m. ET. Access at investor.lpl.com/events.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, LPL Financial Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: LPLA) revealed that its subsidiary, LPL Financial LLC, will disclose its fourth quarter and full year financial outcomes post-market closure on Thursday, January 30. The corporation plans to hold a conference call discussing the results at 5 p.m. ET on the same day. Interested parties can access the call and replay on investor.lpl.com/events.

news.headline: Phillips Edison & Company extends and increases unsecured credit facility to $1.0 billion with maturity date of Jan 9, 2029.
news.summary: CINCINNATI, as of January 9, 2025, Phillips Edison & Company, Inc. (Nasdaq: PECO), a leading owner and operator of grocery-anchored neighborhood shopping centers, has completed the second amendment to its unsecured revolving credit facility. The Revolving Credit Facility has now been expanded to $1.0 billion from $800 million, and the maturity date has been extended to January 9, 2029, with potential for two more six-month extensions. The current term loan remains unchanged in terms of amount and maturity date. Additionally, PECO has the option to increase the Revolving Credit Facility or take on new term loans by up to $500 million and boost the existing term loan by up to $200 million, pending further syndication efforts.

news.headline: Viper Energy plans Q4 earnings release on Feb 24, 2025; conference call scheduled for Feb 25, 2025. (Total characters: 92)
news.summary: In Midland, Texas, on January 9, 2025, Viper Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: VNOM), a subsidiary of Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: FANG), shared its intention to unveil the financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 on February 24, 2025, following the market's closure.

news.headline: Energy company Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: FANG) to release Q4 2024 financial results on Feb 24 and hold conference call on Feb 25. 104 characters
news.summary: In Midland, Texas, a leading energy company, Diamondback Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: FANG), revealed its schedule to disclose financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024 on February 24, 2025, post market hours.

news.headline: Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute appoints Dr. Hussein as Medical Director of Value-Based Care.
news.summary: In Fort Myers, Florida, on January 9, 2025, Maen Hussein, MD has been appointed as the Medical Director of Value-Based Care at Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute, LLC (FCS). Dr. Hussein, a medical oncologist and hematologist, will be taking on this role. This appointment signifies a significant development for FCS, highlighting their focus on enhancing value-based care practices.

news.headline: Cullen/Frost Bankers, Inc. will discuss Q4 2024 earnings in a call on Jan. 30, 2025. Earnings release at 8:00 AM.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Cullen/Frost Bankers, Inc. (NYSE: CFR) announced that they will hold a conference call on January 30, 2025, to review the financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024. The earnings release for the company will be published around 8:00 AM on that day. Shareholders and interested parties can participate in the conference call to learn more about the financial performance of CFR.

news.headline: Orna Therapeutics appoints Vikas Sinha to its Board of Directors. Focus on circular RNA medicines for oncology.
news.summary: Orna Therapeutics, a biotech company based in Watertown, Massachusetts, revealed on January 9, 2025 their focus on developing circular RNA medicines and advanced lipid nanoparticle (LNP) delivery methods for treating cancer and autoimmune illnesses. The company is committed to creating innovative solutions in the field.

news.headline: FDA's Center for Veterinary Medicine grants Innocan Pharma a fee waiver for 2025. Innocan is a pioneer in pharmaceutical and biotechnology.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Innocan Pharma Corporation, a leading player in pharmaceutical and biotechnology sectors, based in Herzliya, Israel and Calgary, Alberta, shared that the FDA's Center for Veterinary has given its approval. The company is listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange (CSE: INNO), Frankfurt Stock Exchange (FSE: IP4), and OTC Markets Group (OTCQB: INNPF).

news.headline: Identiv appoints Kim Macaulay as SVP of Sales, Marketing, and Business Development. She aims to drive growth initiatives.
news.summary: A company based in Santa Ana, California, Identiv, Inc. (NASDAQ: INVE), known for their RFID and BLE-enabled IoT solutions, has welcomed Kim Macaulay as their new Senior Vice President of Sales, Marketing, and Business Development. This appointment is part of the company's strategy to enhance market share and pursue growth opportunities. Ms. Macaulay, a seasoned business leader, will oversee the commercial division to advance Identiv's primary operations and strategic expansions.

news.headline: Intellia Therapeutics prioritizes late-stage programs NTLA-2002 and Nexiguran Ziclumeran for 2025 milestones.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, as of January 9, 2025, Intellia Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:NTLA), a prominent clinical-stage gene editing firm with a focus on advancing medicine through CRISPR-based treatments, revealed its strategic objectives and important milestones projected for 2025. The company aims to revolutionize medical treatments, with a mission to enhance patient outcomes and pave the way for a groundbreaking era in the field of medicine.

news.headline: Mural Oncology anticipates readouts for late-stage trials of nemvaleukin alfa in early 2025 for ovarian cancer and melanoma.
news.summary: Results for two advanced trials, which could lead to registration, of nemvaleukin alfa are anticipated to be released towards the end of the first quarter or early in the second quarter of 2025 for platinum-resistant ovarian cancer. In addition, the readouts for mucosal melanoma are expected in the second quarter of 2025.

news.headline: First AML patients dosed with Tuspetinib triplet in TUSCANY trial, a milestone in cancer treatment. #Aptose #AML #TUSCANY #milestone
news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. This improvement is largely attributed to a rise in job creation, with over 300,000 new jobs being added in the past month alone. The economy seems to be showing signs of recovery, with a growth rate of 5.6% being recorded in the last quarter. Additionally, the stock market has seen a significant increase, with the main index rising by 10% in just the past week. Experts are optimistic about the future trajectory of the economy, projecting further growth and job opportunities in the upcoming months.

news.headline: Zefiro Methane Corp. updates corporate presentation emphasizing growth goals by 2024 and leading in methane abatement sector.
news.summary: Zefiro's updated corporate presentation emphasizes its recent accomplishments and commitment to become the benchmark in the methane abatement industry. The presentation showcases key milestones, underscoring Zefiro's dedication to setting the highest standard in this sector.

news.headline: Frequency Electronics Inc. to present at Needham Conference on Jan 15, 2025, with CEO making presentation at 8:00 AM.
news.summary: MITCHEL FIELD, N.Y., Jan. 09, 2025 - Frequency Electronics, Inc. (FEI), a top supplier of precision timing and frequency control products, will have its management team join the 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference from January 14 to January 17, 2025. CEO Tom McClelland will deliver a presentation on Wednesday, January 15 at 8:00 AM. Following this, FEI management will hold individual conferences from 8:45 AM to 6:00 PM later that day. The conference presents an opportunity for the company to interact with investors and stakeholders and highlight their strategies for growth and development.

news.headline: IQHQ raises $900M for life science districts in 2024 from existing investors, showing strong support for growth.
news.summary: IQHQ, Inc., a leading owner and developer of life science districts, has raised $900 million in new capital in 2024, with the most recent funding round completed in December. Existing institutional equity investors led these rounds, showing continued confidence in IQHQ's business and the promising future of life science real estate for generating value.

news.headline: National Use Your Gift Card Day™ on Jan. 18 encourages consumers to shop with their gift cards, most requested holiday item.
news.summary: On Saturday, January 18th, the sixth annual event will highlight the importance of utilizing gift cards while shopping, a convenient present often overlooked. Taking place in Boca Raton, Florida, on January 9th, 2025, a report stated that gift cards were the most desired items on holiday wish lists this year.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency prices drop: Bitcoin at $91,400 (-2.7%), Ethereum at $3,172 (-3.2%), XRP at $2.28 (-1.4%). Large transactions down 7.6%. 116,166 traders liquidated at $347.45M. Bhutan adopt Bitcoin, Ethereum, BNB as reserves. Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs saw $742M outflows.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets are down due to uncertain Fed interest rate cuts and a potential BTC sell-off by the U.S. government. Bitcoin is at $91,400, down 2.7%; Ethereum at $3,172, down 3.2%; Solana at $182.4, down 6.5%; XRP at $2.28, down 1.4%; Dogecoin at $0.3181, down 6.3%; Shiba Inu at $0.00002088, down 1%. Notable statistics include large transaction volume decrease by 7.6%, with daily active addresses steady. Transactions over $100,000 increased from 10,613 to 11,991 in a day. Exchanges netflows are up by 5.5%. Coinglass data reports 116,166 traders liquidated in 24 hours for $347.45 million. Major developments feature Bhutan’s strategic reserve comprising Bitcoin, Ethereum, and BNB Coin, along with announcements about Bitcoin ETFs.

news.headline: JLL secures $300M refinancing for 800-key Omni Nashville Hotel, a luxury convention center hotel in top lodging market.
news.summary: Funds secured for a large convention center hotel with 800 rooms in a high-performing lodging market in Dallas. As of January 9, 2025, JLL's Capital Markets group has facilitated a $300 million refinancing deal for the Omni Nashville Hotel. This luxury hotel features 800 rooms and is situated in a prime location.

news.headline: IEM International, Inc. announces key leadership changes to drive growth in emergency management, disaster recovery sectors.
news.summary: In an exciting development on January 9, 2025, IEM International, Inc., a renowned company specializing in emergency management, disaster recovery, and critical infrastructure, revealed significant leadership shifts aimed at driving growth. The restructuring includes key promotions and team realignments within the organization. This move underscores the company's commitment to advancing bold growth initiatives.

news.headline: Tango Networks wins award for promoting collaboration with their mobile solution, recognized by Frost & Sullivan Jan. 9, 2025.
news.summary: Tango Extend offers a budget-friendly and dependable mobile communications solution for businesses, allowing access to key telephony features on mobile devices without disruptions. A recent evaluation by Frost & Sullivan in San Antonio on Jan. 9, 2025, highlighted the effectiveness and compliance of this solution.

news.headline: NewAmsterdam Pharma grants 58,000 options to new hires and 170,800 to Chief People Officer under Nasdaq rule.
news.summary: The biopharmaceutical company, NewAmsterdam Pharma Company N.V., based in Naarden, the Netherlands and Miami, revealed that the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors authorized the offering of inducement share options. These options encompass 58,000 of the company's ordinary shares for two new non-executive hires. Additionally, 170,800 ordinary shares were granted to Maryellen McQuade, the newly appointed Chief People Officer. This initiative was taken to attract and retain talent as part of the NewAmsterdam Pharma Company N.V. 2024 Inducement Plan, in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: Article discusses Nvidia (NVDA) stock analysis along with other tech giants; potential buy decision.
news.summary: The latest stock information for Nvidia (NVDA) shows positive ratings along with six other tech giants: Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Meta, Microsoft, and Tesla. Nvidia's stock quote is currently strong, with the company making headlines in the market. For more in-depth analysis on Nvidia's stock performance, check out the Investor's Business Daily for charts and company news updates.

news.headline: Millennials investing in stocks, ETFs, personal finance, and more; planning for retirement. Trends reveal unexpected insights.
news.summary: A recent analysis sheds light on the investment habits and retirement strategies of millennials. Surprisingly, this generation is opting for a diverse portfolio, with a focus on stocks, ETFs, personal finance management, and addressing student loan debts. These trends indicate a shift in traditional investment patterns among younger adults.

news.headline: Latest news on Alphabet (GOOGL) stock with quotes and analysis from Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Read the most recent updates about Alphabet, the parent company of Google, along with stock quotes and in-depth analysis of the search giant's performance. Find out more about Alphabet (GOOGL) stock quotes, company news, and chart analysis on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: DIVACS, Inc. launches in Newark to revolutionize value management, sales, and revenue retention, founded by Ryan Schultz.
news.summary: DIVACS, Inc., a technology company based in Newark, Delaware, has recently launched its operations. The company, led by founder Ryan Schultz, aims to revolutionize how businesses handle and express value during and after the sales process. With a focus on boosting sales efficiency, improving customer retention, and fostering substantial growth, DIVACS leverages Ryan Schultz's 20+ years of expertise in technology and business development.

news.headline: Three insurance companies expected to cover majority of $20 billion L.A. wildfires expenses.
Enron is making a return with a prankster offering merch and an alleged at-home nuclear reactor.
news.summary: A member of the group associated with the viral conspiracy theory "Birds Aren't Real" has returned, aiming to rejuvenate a company linked with unethical business practices. The individual is promoting merchandise and promoting an alleged residential nuclear reactor.

news.headline: Windham Capital Partners appoints Jason Helgerson and Dr. Alistair Erskine as Operating Partners to drive innovation in healthcare transformation.
news.summary: A prominent growth equity firm specializing in health technology has bolstered its capabilities to spearhead innovation in healthcare and digital health transformation. On January 9, 2025, Windham Capital Partners in New York announced this strategic move. The firm, known for its focus on facilitating the integration of digital technologies in healthcare, aims to drive advancements in the sector. With a solid track record in investing in healthtech, Windham Capital Partners is set to leverage its expertise to accelerate the pace of digital transformation in healthcare.

news.headline: Backcast Partners invests in M&R for refinancing. Deal supports M&R Group Holdings, LLC with debt and equity capital.
news.summary: Backcast Partners, a prominent financial firm offering capital for mid-sized businesses, has revealed its latest investment in aiding M&R Group Holdings, LLC with refinancing. The move comes as part of the Company's strategy to boost its position in the market. This development, announced on January 9, 2025, underscores Backcast's commitment to supporting companies in need of capital. This investment is expected to significantly impact M&R's financial standing in the market.

news.headline: Young Living launches sister company Wyld Notes to enhance Network Marketing model, redefining innovation. Jan. 9, 2025.
news.summary: In Lehi, Utah on January 9, 2025, the renowned company Young Living, known for its essential oils and wellness products, has introduced a new subsidiary named Wyld Notes. This new venture aims to support and improve Young Living's established Network Marketing approach. The launch of Wyld Notes showcases Young Living's dedication to innovation and growth in the industry.
